name: padel-tournament-control
description: Static web app for managing racket sport tournaments, group stages and knockout brackets.

scripts.check: node --check src/config.js && node --check src/i18n.js && node --check src/state.js && node --check src/domain.js && node --check src/render.js && node --check src/forms.js && node --check src/export.js && node --check app.js
